violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood filters need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under line equipment and soda dispensing equipment need detail cleaning.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate. Unable to determine at time of inspection.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
